newsArray.title: GT vs RR Live Toss Result And Confirmed Playing 11 For IPL 2026 Qualifier 2
newsArray.description:
GT vs RR Toss Update, Playing 11: The ultimate path to Sunday’s championship finale becomes entirely clear tonight as Gujarat Titans square off against a highly motivated Rajasthan Royals lineup in Qualifier 2 at Mullanpur. The side that triumphs in this high-pressure knockout fixture will immediately secure their place alongside Royal Challengers Bengaluru in the final. This live report will constantly track all changes as they happen.

GT vs RR Toss: Pre-Match Toss Analysis and Weather Conditions

The local playing arena at the Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium features a high-quality surface built with a distinct blend of natural red and black soils. This technical composition traditionally offers true bounce and excellent carry for both aggressive seam bowlers and cross-bat stroke-makers.

Tactical analysts note that early overhead cloud cover might assist lateral movement during the opening powerplay overs, while heavy evening dew remains highly likely to impact the outfield during the second innings. Consequently, the captain winning the coin toss face a massive strategic dilemma regarding whether to set a target or chase under the lights.

GT vs RR Live Toss Update and Captain Selection Decisions

The coin flip remains scheduled for 7:00 PM IST. This designated block will automatically display the live update, winning captain, and immediate tactical choice the moment it occurs.

Until the officials officially confirm the result from the middle, current tracking indicates that teams chasing under lights hold a distinct historical advantage due to the damp outfield conditions. However, the immense psychological scoreboard pressure of an IPL knockout could tempt teams to bat first.

GT vs RR Confirmed Line-Ups

Gujarat Titans (GT) Confirmed Playing XI

Currently displaying the predicted team sheet. The verified, official Playing XI and designated Impact Player options will populate here instantly following the toss.

Sai Sudharsan, Shubman Gill (C), Jos Buttler (WK), Nishant Sindhu, Washington Sundar, Jason Holder, Rahul Tewatia, Rashid Khan, Arshad Khan, Kagiso Rabada, Mohammed Siraj

Rajasthan Royals (RR) Confirmed Playing XI

Currently displaying the predicted team sheet. The verified, official Playing XI and designated Impact Player options will populate here instantly following the toss.

Yashasvi Jaiswal, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Dhruv Jurel (WK), Riyan Parag (C), Donovan Ferreira, Dasun Shanaka, Ravindra Jadeja, Jofra Archer, Nandre Burger, Yash Raj Punja, Brijesh Sharma
keywords: gt vs rr live toss update
creator: prateek thakur
